zotero.abstractNote: We present SCENIC, a novel framework for instruction-guided navigation in complex 3D environments. Unlike existing methods that rely on simple point-goal navigation or predefined maps, SCENIC leverages semantic scene understanding to interpret natural language instructions and navigate towards semantically defined goals. Our approach integrates a hierarchical control policy that decomposes high-level instructions into actionable sub-goals, enabling robust navigation in dynamic and unseen environments. We demonstrate that SCENIC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both simulation and real-world scenarios, showing improved success rates and efficiency in complex navigation tasks.
